import json, pandas as pd

perfect = pd.DataFrame(var_call_PxNdXRUWUsnLGw6ImYs1THBQ)

# load full books_info
import pathlib
with open(var_call_PlY9kclTaRWNUIdXEDkSY4zC, 'r') as f:
    books = json.load(f)
books_df = pd.DataFrame(books)

# filter English + Literature & Fiction
mask_lit = books_df['categories'].str.contains('Literature & Fiction', case=False, na=False)
mask_eng = books_df['details'].str.contains('English', case=False, na=False) | books_df['categories'].str.contains('English', case=False, na=False)
eng_lit = books_df[mask_lit & mask_eng]

# join on fuzzy id: purchaseid_X vs bookid_X (match numeric suffix)
perfect['suffix'] = perfect['purchase_id'].str.extract(r'(\d+)$')
eng_lit['suffix'] = eng_lit['book_id'].str.extract(r'(\d+)$')

merged = pd.merge(perfect, eng_lit, on='suffix', how='inner')

result = merged[['book_id','title','avg_rating','num_reviews']].drop_duplicates().to_dict(orient='records')

out = json.dumps(result)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(out)
